who: procurement teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/week
offer: For procurement teams in accounting firms processing 10–20 invoices/week, delayed alerts cause late orders. We automate overdue alerts instead of manual tracking of payment statuses.
problem: Overdue vendor payments due to lack of timely alerts.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for procurement teams
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to procurement teams with demo video
Community forums for procurement tools sharing
try_it: Let users try weekly email alerts for overdue payments and dashboard for tracking payment statuses on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
